10:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"LLM Backends (Host Adapter)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne can route LLM-backed operations — consolidation (",["$","code",null,{"children":"sleep()"}],") and structured fact extraction — through a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"host-provided backend"}]," instead of its own remote/local chain. This is essential when Mnemosyne runs inside ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hermes"}]," and the user has an ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"OAuth-backed provider"}]," (ChatGPT, Codex) that cannot be reached via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Why"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The standalone LLM path expects an OpenAI-compatible URL plus API key:"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8080/v1\nMNEMOSYNE_LLM_API_KEY=sk-...\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["OAuth/session-backed providers like ",["$","code",null,{"children":"openai-codex"}]," use provider-specific routing, headers, OAuth refresh, and Codex Responses API translation. Reproducing all of that inside Mnemosyne would be heavy. Reusing what Hermes already authenticates is dramatically simpler."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"┌─────────────────┐     ┌──────────────────────┐     ┌─────────────────┐\n│   Mnemosyne     │────▶│  Host LLM Backend    │────▶│  Hermes aux     │\n│   sleep()       │     │  (registered at init) │     │  call_llm()     │\n│   extract()     │     │                       │     │  (OAuth, Codex) │\n└─────────────────┘     └──────────────────────┘     └─────────────────┘\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The backend is a tiny ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"one-method interface"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"class LLMBackend:\n    name: str\n\n    def complete(self, prompt, *, max_tokens, temperature, timeout,\n                 provider=None, model=None) -> str | None:\n        ...\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Required: opt in to the host backend\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true\n\n# Optional overrides (Hermes auto-resolution otherwise)\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_PROVIDER=openai-codex\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_MODEL=gpt-5.1-mini\nexport MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_N_CTX=32000\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"HOST_LLM_ENABLED"}]," is unset or false, behavior is ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"identical to before"}]," — remote URL → local GGUF → AAAK."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Fallback Chain"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=true"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-text","children":"0. Host backend (if registered)\n   ↓ on failure: skip remote URL entirely (A3 rule)\n1. Local GGUF (ctransformers / llama-cpp-python)\n   ↓ on failure\n2. Return None / [] — caller falls back to AAAK encoding\n"}]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_HOST_LLM_ENABLED=false"}]," or unset:"]}],"\n",["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-text","children":"0. Remote OpenAI-compatible API (if MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL set)\n   ↓ on failure\n1. Local GGUF\n   ↓ on failure\n2. AAAK encoding\n"}]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"The \"Host-Skips-Remote\" Rule (A3)"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["When the host attempt produces no usable text (errors, empty response, no extractable content), the ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"remote URL is skipped entirely"}],". The fallback goes straight to local GGUF."]}],"\n","$L3","\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc"],["$Ld"],"$Le"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"pMIkU1wrkmgfuKmzX27e7"}
3:["$","p",null,{"children":["This prevents Mnemosyne from accidentally routing memory content to a stale ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_LLM_BASE_URL"}]," the user forgot to clear after switching to Hermes."]}]
4:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"For Other Agents"}]
5:["$","p",null,{"children":"Any host can register its own backend:"}]
6:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-python","children":"from mnemosyne.core.llm_backends import LLMBackend, set_host_llm_backend\n\nclass MyAgentBackend:\n    name = \"my-agent\"\n\n    def complete(self, prompt, *, max_tokens, temperature, timeout,\n                 provider=None, model=None):\n        # Route through your authenticated client\n        return text_or_none\n\nset_host_llm_backend(MyAgentBackend())\n"}]}]
7:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Session Shutdown"}]
8:["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne's ",["$","code",null,{"children":"on_session_end()"}]," hook runs sleep/consolidation in a ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"daemon thread"}]," with a 15-second join timeout. If consolidation cannot finish in time (e.g., a slow host LLM call), the join returns and Hermes shutdown proceeds unblocked. The daemon thread continues in the background and is reaped when the process exits."]}]
9:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Temperature Contracts"}]
a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Operation"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Temperature"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Reason"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Fact extraction"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.0"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Deterministic — avoids near-duplicate facts on re-ingest"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"0.3"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Paraphrasing variance is acceptable"}]]}]]}]]}]
b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Related"}]
c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/getting-started/hermes-llm","children":"Hermes LLM Integration"}]," — full behavior model and session-shutdown semantics"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/sleep-consolidation","children":"Sleep Consolidation"}]," — how consolidation uses the LLM backend"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","a",null,{"href":"/architecture/fact-extraction","children":"Fact Extraction"}]," — structured fact extraction with host routing"]}],"\n"]}]
